zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew Moodie Rankin於1570年出生在蘇格蘭斯林史爾波斯肯納爾時，他的父親James Rankin30歲，母親Jane Elizabeth Phelps30歲。他於大約1589年與Margaret Patoun or Paterson在蘇格蘭可拉可曼南史爾圖利波迪結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1616年8月28日在英國蘇格蘭奧可尼聖 安德魯斯享年46歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭金洛-爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andrew Moodie Rankin于1570年出生在苏格兰斯林史爾波斯肯納爾时，他的父亲James Rankin30岁，母亲Jane Elizabeth Phelps30岁。他于大约1589年与Margaret Patoun or Paterson在苏格兰可拉可曼南史爾圖利波迪结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1616年8月28日在英国苏格兰奧可尼聖 安德魯斯享年46岁，埋葬在苏格兰金洛-爾。

nameMeanings.name: Rankin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: from Middle English Ran(d)kin, a diminutive of Ran(d), a pet form of the personal name Ran(d)ulf. See Rand , Randolph , Randall . This name was brought to Northern Ireland (Derry) from Scotland in the 17th century.

variants.name: Rand
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Rand, a pet form of Randolf. Compare Randolph , Randall , Randy , and see also Rance .
English: habitational name from Rand (Lincolnshire), Rand Grange (North Yorkshire), or Raunds (Northamptonshire), all of which derive from Old English rand ‘edge, border, rim’.
German: from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic compound personal names formed with rand ‘rim (of a shield)’. Compare 1 above.

variants.name: Rankins
meanings: English (London): variant of Rankin , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Rank
meanings: English: nickname for a powerfully built man or someone of violent emotions, from Middle English rank ‘proud, headstrong, stout-hearted’ (Old English ranc ‘proud, rebellious’).
English: from a Middle English personal name Ranke, a back-formation from the diminutive Rankin .
South German: variant of   Rang   2. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

nameMeanings.name: Moodie
meanings: Probably pet -names formed from the adjective good.

variants.name: Gooddie
meanings: Probably pet -names formed from the adjective good.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew Moodie Rankin was born in 1570, in Bothkennar, Stirlingshire, Scotland, his father, James Rankin, was 30 and his mother, Jane Elizabeth Phelps, was 30. He married Margaret Patoun or Paterson about 1589, in Tullibody, Clackmannanshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 28 August 1616, in St. Andrews, Orkney, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 46, and was buried in Kinross-shire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andrew Moodie Rankin est né en 1570, à Bothkennar, Stirlingshire, Écosse, son père, James Rankin, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Jane Elizabeth Phelps, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Patoun or Paterson environ 1589, à Tullibody, Clackmannanshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 28 août 1616, à St. Andrews, Orkney, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Kinross-shire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Andrew Moodie Rankin 1570 in Bothkennar, Stirlingshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Rankin 30 und seine Mutter Jane Elizabeth Phelps 30. Er hat um 1589 in Tullibody, Clackmannanshire, Scotland Margaret Patoun or Paterson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. August 1616 im Alter von 46 Jahren in St. Andrews, Orkney, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Kinross-shire, Scotland begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret Patoun or Paterson circa 1589, nel Tullibody, Clackmannanshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Andrew Moodie Rankinが1570年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアボスケナルで生まれた時，父James Rankinは30歳，母Jane Elizabeth Phelpsは30歳であった。約1589年にスコットランドクラクマナンシュアイアトゥリボディでMargaret Patoun or Patersonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1616年8月28日にイギリススコットランドオルクニースト. アンドリュースで46歳で死去し，スコットランドキンロス-シュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew Moodie Rankin(이)가 1570년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 벗h켄아르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Rankin(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Elizabeth Phelps(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1589년 스컷랜드 클랙먼아실르 투리보디에서 Margaret Patoun or Paterson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1616년 8월 28일 영국 스코틀랜드 르니 스트. 앤드루스에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 킨로스-실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Moodie Rankin nasceu em 1570, em Bothkennar, Stirlingshire, Scotland, seu pai, James Rankin, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Jane Elizabeth Phelps, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Patoun or Paterson aproximadamente 1589, em Tullibody, Clackmannanshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 28 de agosto de 1616, em St. Andrews, Orkney, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Kinross-shire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew Moodie Rankin родился в 1570 г. в местности боткеннар, стирлингшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени James Rankin было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Elizabeth Phelps, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Patoun or Paterson около 1589 г. в местности туллибоди, клаккманнаньшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 28 августа 1616 г. в местности ст. андрюс, орни, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности кинросс-шир, Шотландия.
